description: Ordered promptset registry. Every .prompts/PROMPT_XX.txt file is listed in filename order.
source_of_truth_note: Prompt files are authoritative; this registry supports navigation and ordering checks.

items.name: Foundation Bootstrap
items.purpose: Establish the repo foundation, identity, guardrails, and first navigation surfaces.
items.safe_use_notes: Execute as a bounded foundation prompt.

items.name: Doctrine, Glossary, And Anti-Patterns
items.purpose: Create doctrine, vocabulary, and anti-pattern guidance for prompt-bounded work.
items.safe_use_notes: Keep doctrine descriptive and grounded in repo boundaries.

items.name: Role Taxonomy And Organization Model
items.purpose: Define the Orchestrator, Lead, Worker, and supporting role model.
items.safe_use_notes: Do not turn role docs into hidden authority.

items.name: Skill Taxonomy And Routine Catalog
items.purpose: Document skill areas and routine catalogs for assistant work.
items.safe_use_notes: Keep routines inspectable before automation.

items.name: Session Lifecycle And Endcaps
items.purpose: Define session lifecycle, closeout, bridge, reset, and adjacent-prompt readiness behavior.
items.safe_use_notes: Use endcaps to validate, not to implement future prompts.

items.name: Memory Planes And Promotion Model
items.purpose: Define memory planes, promotion rules, handoff lifecycle, and retention boundaries.
items.safe_use_notes: Raw assistant chatter is not durable memory.

items.name: Contracts And Templates
items.purpose: Create contract references and reusable markdown templates.
items.safe_use_notes: Templates require review before use as records.

items.name: Runbooks And Micro-Routines
items.purpose: Add runbooks and detailed micro-routines for repeated operator workflows.
items.safe_use_notes: Keep procedures bounded and human-operated.

items.name: Lightweight Helper Scripts
items.purpose: Introduce dependency-free helper CLI checks and scaffolding.
items.safe_use_notes: Helper scripts must not become provider automation.

items.name: Example Scenarios And Walkthroughs
items.purpose: Create example scenarios that demonstrate prompt execution, delegation, promotion, and repair.
items.safe_use_notes: Examples are illustrative, not canonical runtime state.

items.name: Experiments, Reports, And Findings
items.purpose: Add lab evidence structures for experiments, reports, and findings.
items.safe_use_notes: Promote findings only through reviewed evidence.

items.name: Quality, Validation, And Promptset Discipline
items.purpose: Define validation gates, promptset quality, audit protocol, and completion states.
items.safe_use_notes: Validation supports judgment and does not replace prompt requirements.

items.name: Operator Control Surfaces And Metadata
items.purpose: Document operator controls and derived metadata records with schemas.
items.safe_use_notes: Metadata remains derived from repo facts.

items.name: Future Architecture And Phase-One Capstone Audit
items.purpose: Capture future architecture guidance and audit phase-one coverage.
items.safe_use_notes: Future architecture notes are not implemented runtime capabilities.

items.name: Registries And Navigation Data
items.purpose: Create curated registries and navigation maps with lightweight validation.
items.safe_use_notes: Registries are indexes, not exhaustive mirrors.

items.name: Prompt Template Library
items.purpose: Build reusable prompt templates for future prompt authoring.
items.safe_use_notes: Preflight only until this prompt is active.

items.name: Project Skills
items.purpose: Introduce project-specific skills for repeatable assistant capabilities.
items.safe_use_notes: Skills should remain explicit and reviewable.

items.name: Role Packs And Lane Playbooks
items.purpose: Create role packs and lane-specific playbooks for coordinated work.
items.safe_use_notes: Do not overstate runtime delegation support.

items.name: Run Records, Fixtures, And Schema Coverage
items.purpose: Expand run record fixtures and schema validation coverage.
items.safe_use_notes: Schemas validate records but do not create truth.

items.name: Traceability Collector
items.purpose: Add tooling to collect prompt-to-change traceability from durable repo evidence.
items.safe_use_notes: Use git and files as authoritative evidence.

items.name: Promptset Linter And Readiness Scoring
items.purpose: Add promptset linting and readiness scoring checks.
items.safe_use_notes: Scores should aid review, not hide blockers.

items.name: Documentation Link And Navigation Checker
items.purpose: Validate documentation links and navigation paths.
items.safe_use_notes: Check links without rewriting docs wholesale.

items.name: Dry-Run Harness Simulations
items.purpose: Create dry-run simulations for harness workflows.
items.safe_use_notes: Keep simulations local and non-provider.

items.name: Experiment Tooling And Findings Workflow
items.purpose: Add helper support for experiment and findings workflows.
items.safe_use_notes: Evidence remains reviewed before promotion.

items.name: Memory Tooling And Promotion Queue
items.purpose: Add tooling for memory promotion candidates and queues.
items.safe_use_notes: Queue entries are candidates, not accepted memory.

items.name: Operator Console Surface
items.purpose: Build an operator-facing console surface if justified by prior workflow evidence.
items.safe_use_notes: Avoid daemon or autonomous behavior unless explicitly scoped.

items.name: Lane Simulation Harness
items.purpose: Simulate lane-based orchestration and role handoffs.
items.safe_use_notes: Simulation output is evidence, not production runtime state.

items.name: Domain Pack Starter Kit
items.purpose: Create starter structures for domain-specific harness packs.
items.safe_use_notes: Keep domain packs optional and explicit.

items.name: Assistant Usage Guides
items.purpose: Add assistant-specific usage guidance while preserving provider boundaries.
items.safe_use_notes: Avoid vendor-specific runtime assumptions unless scoped.

items.name: Safety, Permissions, And Data Hygiene
items.purpose: Strengthen safety, permission, and data hygiene guidance.
items.safe_use_notes: Prefer explicit operator approval for risky actions.

items.name: Release Readiness And Documentation Polish
items.purpose: Polish docs and readiness checks for a release baseline.
items.safe_use_notes: Polish should not invent implemented features.

items.name: Final Capstone And Operating Baseline
items.purpose: Complete the initial operating baseline and capstone review.
items.safe_use_notes: Audit against actual delivered artifacts.

items.name: Outer Loop Requirements And Safety Boundary
items.purpose: Define requirements and safety boundaries for outer-loop automation work.
items.safe_use_notes: Requirements do not imply implementation.

items.name: Assistant Driver Contracts And Capability Probes
items.purpose: Specify assistant driver contracts and capability probes.
items.safe_use_notes: Keep probes explicit and bounded.

items.name: Sequential Batch Planner And Dry-Run Runner
items.purpose: Plan sequential prompt batches and add a dry-run runner.
items.safe_use_notes: Dry-run behavior should be distinguishable from live execution.

items.name: Validation, Audit, And Readiness Gate Integration
items.purpose: Integrate validation, audit, and readiness gates into outer-loop flows.
items.safe_use_notes: Gate failures should stay visible to the operator.

items.name: Live Sequential Runner MVP
items.purpose: Implement a minimal live sequential runner after safety and dry-run groundwork.
items.safe_use_notes: Live execution requires explicit safety boundaries.

items.name: Commit Planner And Explicit Commit Executor
items.purpose: Add commit planning and explicit commit execution support.
items.safe_use_notes: Never commit without operator intent.

items.name: Resume, Failure Handling, And Run Ledger Hardening
items.purpose: Harden resume behavior, failure handling, and run ledger records.
items.safe_use_notes: Recovered state must be backed by durable artifacts.

items.name: Pi Adapter Experiment
items.purpose: Run an adapter experiment influenced by pi-mono concepts without copying identity or implementation.
items.safe_use_notes: Reference repos are inspiration only.

items.name: Outer Loop Capstone And Operating Baseline
items.purpose: Audit and baseline the outer-loop automation phase.
items.safe_use_notes: Capstone claims must match implemented capabilities.
